violations.text: Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
Shellstock tags did not have all of the required information. Last date of sale were lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

Various food items in the prep unit and the walk-in refrigerator were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
Rodenticide observed uncovered in the basement area. Rodent bait shall be contained in a covered, tamper-resistant bait station. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
The cutting boards in the back prep room area are very scratched and scored. PIC disposed of items at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023

The prep unit in the kitchen area was observed maintaining an ambient of 45 degrees Fahrenheit. The unit to not be used until it can be serviced/replaced/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwashers. PIC ordered test strips at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
